problem.title: Contains Duplicate
problem.description: Given an integer array nums, return true if any value appears at least twice in the array, and return false if every element is distinct.

example.explanation: 1 appears twice. Return true if any value appears at least twice.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – HashSet [✓ Interviewer Accepted]
solutions.description: Stream through the array inserting each element into a HashSet; if the element is already present, a duplicate exists and we return true immediately. This gives O(n) time with O(n) space and short-circuits as soon as the first duplicate is found.
